best_prompt: Think like a competitive programmer. Identify the algorithm pattern — greedy, dynamic programming, graph traversal, binary search, math. Write the most direct correct solution as a complete C++ program. Use cin/cout, include main(), handle all cases within the constraints. Output only the program.
